name: Go Go UFO!
author: Poki
description: Go Go Ufo is a racing skill game by Nitrome. You pilot a small space ship from above. You will need to be extra precise on your movements to win the race ! Can you be the best spaceship racer and get to the finish line first ? How to play: Move around with WASD or arrow keys About the creator: Go Go Ufo was created by Nitrome as a flash game, and later emulated in HTML5 by AwayFL for Poki. Play Nitrome's other flash games on Poki: Swindler 2 , Avalanche , Cave Chaos 2 , Enemy 585 , Silly Sausage , Swindler , Coil , Cold Storage , Twin Shot 2 , Bad Ice-Cream , Bad Ice-Cream 2 , Bad Ice-Cream 3 , Cave Chaos , Mutiny , Skywire , Twin Shot , Test Subject Green and Test Subject Blue
